free_text: Measurements of proton induced thick target gamma-ray
yields on B, N, Na, Al and Si from 2.5 to 4.1 MeV.
The HVEE 3 MV Tandetron accelerator
at the INFN LABEC laboratory in Florence
The targets used were thick samples of Al, NaNO(3),SiN
and BN.
three HPGe coaxial detectors.
The crystal size of the detector at 90-degree is
65.8 mm diameter and 70.2 mm length, the crystal size
of the detector at 45-degree is 52.3 mm diameter and
63.2 mm length, the crystal size of the detector at
0-degree is 55.8 mm diameter and 54.8 mm length
The estimated uncertainties in the absolute values of
the differential cross sections are
Error in peak area.
Error in beam charge
Error in detector absolute efficiency
Statistical uncertainty
Data received from M.Chiari via NDS in
R33 format
SB

merged. Part of ERR-ANALYS moved to Subents 002-018.
